# Play Years

> Co-created with early childhood experts, the Play Years™ First-Year Deck gives you research-backed ways to play with your baby — so you always know what to do, and why it matters.

Play Years makes activity cards for babies 0–12 months. The First-Year Deck is designed for real life and tired parents, with science-backed play ideas that fit into everyday moments.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://playyears.com): Overview of Play Years and the First-Year Activity Deck.
- [Shop](https://playyears.com/shop): Purchase the Play Years™ First-Year Activity Deck.
- [About](https://playyears.com/about): Meet Lee and Denoja — the product designers and parents behind Play Years.
- [Our Approach](https://playyears.com/approach): Research-backed play that fits your day. How Play Years cards are designed for real life and tired parents.
- [Resources](https://playyears.com/resources): Resources for parents and early childhood educators.
- [Ambassador Program](https://playyears.com/ambassador): Become a Play Years Ambassador and earn exclusive perks.
- [Wholesale](https://playyears.com/wholesale): Partner with Play Years — wholesale options for retailers, educators, and community organizations.
- [Giveaway](https://playyears.com/giveaway): Current Play Years giveaway information.
- [Contact](https://playyears.com/contact): Get in touch with the Play Years team.
